summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Sales Rep Territory Overlay and Per Rep Win Zones features. All 10 features tested - 10 passed. Sales Territories toggle shows colored state-level boundaries for all 6 reps. Filter by rep expands to show individual rep toggles with eye icons and crosshair buttons. Montana is correctly split at latitude 47.5 between Laramie (south/red) and Matthew (north/orange). Per Rep mode in Win Zones shows zone cards named after each sales rep.
passed_tests: Sales Territories toggle ON shows colored state fills for all 6 reps on the map - PASS
Sales Territories toggle OFF removes all territory fills from map - PASS
Expanding 'Filter by rep' shows all 6 reps with eye icons and crosshair buttons - PASS
Clicking eye icon for a rep hides/shows their territory on the map - PASS
Clicking crosshair zooms to that rep's territory - PASS
Montana is split — southern half is red (Laramie), northern half is orange (Matthew) - PASS (verified via screenshots)
Per Rep button in Win Zones Focus row activates per-rep mode - PASS
Per Rep mode shows zone cards named after the rep (found Matthew Horlacher, Miya Butler, Natalie Tokach) - PASS
Toggling Per Rep off returns to normal 5-zone national mode - PASS
Market Views (Wheat, Corn, etc.) still work correctly with territories enabled - PASS
test_credentials: No authentication required. Mapbox token configured in frontend/.env
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - using existing data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sales Rep Territory Overlay and Per Rep Win Zones features fully implemented and tested. Key data-testids: territories-toggle, territories-expand, territory-rep-{laramie|sid|miya|matthew|tyler|natalie}, territory-eye-{id}, territory-zoom-{id}, zone-per-rep. The 6 reps are: Laramie Wiginton (red #DC2626), Sid Chambers (green #16A34A), Miya Butler (blue #2563EB), Matthew Horlacher (orange #EA580C), Tyler Pierson (yellow #EAB308), Natalie Tokach (purple #7C3AED). Montana split at latitude 47.5 - south goes to Laramie, north goes to Matthew.

territories_toggle_on.details: Toggle works, shows colored state fills for all 6 reps

territories_toggle_off.details: Toggle off removes all territory fills from map

filter_by_rep_expand.details: All 6 reps visible with eye icons and crosshair buttons: laramie, sid, miya, matthew, tyler, natalie

eye_icon_toggle.details: Clicking eye icon dims the rep row (opacity-40) and hides territory on map

crosshair_zoom.details: Clicking crosshair zooms map to rep's territory bounding box

montana_split.details: Montana split at latitude 47.5 - southern counties show red (Laramie), northern counties show orange (Matthew)

per_rep_mode_activation.details: Per Rep button activates with bg-stone-800 class when clicked

per_rep_zone_cards.details: Zone cards show rep names: Matthew Horlacher, Miya Butler, Natalie Tokach found in cards

per_rep_mode_off.details: Toggling Per Rep off returns to geographic zone names (Central North Dakota, Central Kansas, etc.)

market_views_with_territories.details: Switching between Wheat, Corn, Rice markets works correctly with territories enabled
